name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem would this solve?

## Proposed Solution

What should Asas OS do?

## Alternatives

What other approaches did you consider?

## Risk

Does this affect boot, memory, storage, filesystems, networking, GUI, or security?

## Test Plan

How could this be tested in QEMU, Hyper-V, or host-side tools?
